Dialog.name: MSG_010_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 4 0 52 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 3125 0 0}Slacking off on training can impact both boxing and actual battles.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 4 0 52 -1 0 0}It's too bad I've fallen out of practice. I'll have to work harder to get back to where I was before.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_063_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 4 0 52 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 3099 0 0}First, the dorm's connected to some kind of labyrinth, and now we're traveling to the past...?[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 4 2 52 -1 0 0}What exactly is going on here, dammit!?[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_011_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 4 0 52 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 3112 0 0}I thought I'd been doing all right, making sure my stamina doesn't get any worse, but guess I thought wrong.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 4 0 52 -1 0 0}Actual combat can't compare to working out at the gym, but... That's just an excuse.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_013_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 4 3 52 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 3082 0 0}Losing a parent is hard... in more than one way.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 4 3 52 -1 0 0}It was hard for me, too—and I was too young to even remember my parents' faces.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 4 3 52 -1 0 0}I don't think any of us can blame Amada for the decisions he made back then.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 4 0 52 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 3053 0 0}Sorry, didn't mean to make the mood so glum. Was just thinking about things.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_014_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 4 0 52 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 3012 0 0}Shinji joined the team right after I did.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 4 0 52 -1 0 0}His potential wasn't that high, though. Nobody was sure if he could even control his Persona.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 4 0 52 -1 0 0}I told him to give up, but... He just pushed his way into the dorm, wouldn't take no for an answer.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 4 3 52 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 3122 0 0}I guess he did all that for me... Seriously, that guy...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_016_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 4 0 52 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 3024 0 0}Koromaru wasn't the only one he met that day. I ran into him as well.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 4 0 52 -1 0 0}If I hadn't been out patrolling that night, maybe he wouldn't be here, fighting with us.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 4 1 52 -1 0 0}A chance encounter indeed.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_017_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 4 3 52 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 3004 0 0}Makes you wonder what it's like to be born into a prestigious family. To think she was fighting Shadows at that young an age...[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 4 3 52 -1 0 0}Shinji and I don't even remember our parents' faces. It was painful, but... in a way, that made things easier for us as well.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 4 0 52 -1 0 0}Especially considering the burden Mitsuru must have had to shoulder.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_018_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 4 0 52 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 3073 0 0}Metis said that we're the reason the Abyss of Time exists, right...?[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 4 2 52 -1 0 0}And the place is infested with Shadows... Dammit, what the hell does it all mean!?[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 4 2 52 -1 0 0}At the risk of sounding like Junpei... I have no idea what's going on.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_019_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 4 9 52 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 3116 0 0}Looked like that figure was trying to lure us in... Heh. We could just take the bait.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 4 9 52 -1 0 0}We'll find out who exactly this mystery person is soon enough.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_020_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 4 0 52 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 3080 0 0}I understand why someone would want to change the past, how desperate they must be for the chance to do so...[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 4 0 52 -1 0 0}But would we be meddling with the past for him? Or for our own sake?[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 4 3 52 -1 0 0}Because he wasn't the victim of some random accident. He chose this.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 4 0 52 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 3082 0 0}That's why... I won't change the past. I'll never agree to it.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_021_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 4 0 52 -1 0 0}I thought I had already accepted his death, but... Maybe, in the end, I didn't want to face it.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 4 0 52 -1 0 0}I'll see it through this time, though. For closure's sake.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_022_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 4 3 52 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 3055 0 0}Before we fought, I said you had nothing to fight for, didn't I? Sorry about that.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 4 3 52 -1 0 0}You put your life on the line to arrive at your answer... Guess there's still a lot I have to learn.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_040_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 4 0 52 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 3002 0 0}Hey, good timing. You free right now?[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 4 0 52 -1 0 0}Was hoping we could talk about that book we found in the Abyss. You know, {f 4 4 0 37 1 16778}?[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MND_041_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}Should I spend time with Sanada-san...?[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_044_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 4 1 52 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 3041 0 0}Thanks. Amada's been reading it, and he's got some questions.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 4 1 52 -1 0 0}Figured it'd be a good idea for him to get some pointers from people with different fighting styles.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_043_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 4 0 52 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 3049 0 0}All right. Well, just let me know when you've got the time.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_050_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 4 0 52 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 3011 0 0}Oh, hey. Listen, I've got some time on my hands right now...[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 4 0 52 -1 0 0}So I was thinking about reading that book we found in the Abyss. You interested?[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_051_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 4 1 52 -1 0 0}"{f 4 4 0 37 1 16779}," huh... Interesting title. Kinda got me curious.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_052_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 4 0 52 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 3061 0 0}All good. Not like reading it together changes the content or anything.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_053_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 4 0 52 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 3005 0 0}What's up? That book pique your interest?[n]{f 1 1}
